caption.caption: A traditional Korean hanok house with a tiled roof and stone foundation stands nestled amongst lush greenery.

level2.caption: A single-story building with a dark tiled roof and light-colored walls rests on a stone foundation surrounded by trees and greenery.

level3.caption: This traditional Korean architecture features a dark tiled roof and light-colored walls set upon a stone foundation amidst lush greenery.

level4.caption: This traditional Korean house, part of the Goseong Wanggok Village, showcases the classic architectural elements of a hanok with its dark tiled roof, light-colored walls, and stone foundation, reflecting a harmonious blend with the surrounding natural landscape.

level4.caption: This long-exposure photograph depicts Haman Nakhwa Nori, a traditional Korean game where participants create streaks of light with flaming torches, symbolizing wishes for good luck and prosperity during nighttime celebrations.
